case_title: THE CITY TOW VS AITEMON, WAYNENARD

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AITEMON, WAYNENARD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-05-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-22-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT AITEMON, WAYNENARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AITEMON, WAYNENARD
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-21-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-30-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-30-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-05-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PARTIES REQUEST.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW HEARING SET FOR APR-10-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-10-2001, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AITEMON, WAYNENARD $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $63.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $363.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
